---

## Overview

> A proprietary machine learning / ai system comprising 38795 integrated source modules.

**AI cyber survilance cyber tool.** is an advanced machine learning / ai system engineered by **Karthik Idikuda**. Built with OpenCV, TensorFlow.

<br/>

## System Architecture

```mermaid
graph TD;
    A["Raw Data Input"] -->|"Ingest"| B["Preprocessing Pipeline"];
    B -->|"Image Frames"| CV["Computer Vision<br/>OpenCV"];
    CV -->|"Feature Maps"| D;
    B -->|"Clean Tensors"| D{"TensorFlow Engine"};
    D -->|"Training Loop"| E["Inference & Prediction"];
    E -->|"Metrics"| F["Evaluation & Output"];

    style A fill:#001a05,stroke:#7ee787,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
    style B fill:#00260a,stroke:#7ee787,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style D fill:#001a05,stroke:#7ee787,stroke-width:3px,color:#fff
    style E fill:#00260a,stroke:#7ee787,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style F fill:#003310,stroke:#7ee787,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
```

<br/>

## Project Structure

```
AI-cyber-survilance-cyber-tool./
  .gitattributes
  LICENSE
  README.md
  app.py
  event_log.txt
  keylog.txt
  main.py
  main.spec
  build/
  dist/
    main.exe
  logs/
    events.csv
    identity_profiler.log
    keylog.csv
    keylog.txt
  modules/
    fake_popup.py
    identity_profiler.py
    keylogger.py
    network_scanner.py
  screenshots/
    screen_20250425_183031.png
    screen_20250425_183303.png
    screen_20250425_183334.png
  venv/
```

<br/>

| Attribute | Detail |
|:---|:---|
| **Primary Language** | `Python` |
| **Project Category** | `Machine Learning / AI` |
| **Total Source Files** | `38795` |
| **Frameworks** | `OpenCV`, `TensorFlow` |
| **IP Status** | `Strictly Proprietary` |

## Dependencies

<p align="left">
  <code>pynput</code>  <code>pyyaml</code>  <code>scapy</code>  <code>yolo</code>  <code>tensorflow</code>  <code>pyautogui</code>  <code>opencv-python</code>  <code>deepface</code>
</p>
